title: God Bless U Mamey Lyrics

seo.title: God Bless U Mamey Lyrics
seo.description: Full God Bless U songs lyrics, Good Bad Ugly Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vignesh Shivan, Music: GV PrakashKumar, Singer(s): Anirudh.
seo.keywords: Vignesh Shivan, Good Bad Ugly, GV PrakashKumar, Anirudh, God Bless U full lyrics, Good Bad Ugly songs lyrics, God Bless U lyrics snippets, God Bless U WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share God Bless U lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song God Bless U Mamey conveys a lively and celebratory vibe, perfect for parties and gatherings.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Good Bad Ugly, this song is featured during a high-energy celebration scene, enhancing the festive atmosphere.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Anirudh and composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was the song released?

God Bless U Mamey was released on March 31, 2025.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In God Bless U Mamey, the upbeat tempo and lively lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration. The song encapsulates the essence of fun and energy, making it a perfect fit for party scenes in Good Bad Ugly. With Anirudh's captivating voice and the catchy composition by GV PrakashKumar, it evokes feelings of excitement and happiness. This track is sure to resonate with anyone looking to uplift their spirits and enjoy the moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: God Bless U Mamey from Good Bad Ugly is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the vibrant spirit of celebration. With Anirudh's dynamic vocals and GV PrakashKumar's infectious beats, this track is bound to get you on your feet. Experience the unique blend of catchy lyrics by Vignesh Shivan that elevates the party vibe to a whole new level!
stanzaMeanings: Ready, my friend, let's get the vibe going, let's get the sound going.
With a bang, bang, bang, they come with their hands, we will score a goal and celebrate together.
Hey, with a little twist and a joke, we will make it big, let's play the drums.
It's not just a joke, it's serious, we will take on the mafia and win.
GBU my friend, God bless you my friend, GBU my friend, God bless you my friend.
If there's a bad trip, let's quickly finish the story, if friendship comes, let's throw a party.
If they are ruthless, they will not have a heart, if you want to connect with me, you need to cross over.
With a twist and a turn, real power will shine, look at you, facing the challenge.
With a bang, bang, if you hit, it will be exciting, if you change, you will change everything.
GBU my friend... God Bless U blast... AK on fire... AK on fire... Ready, my friend... Ready, my friend...
I tell all the dudes, I have seen many tools, if I sketch something, it will be breaking news at six, don't be lazy, give me clues, if you smile and talk, the rules will change.
The sound that comes from the gun is like a song to me, the melody is beautiful, I will surround you, whatever I do, it won't bring hate towards you.
Why, cute, white, salt and pepper, a sale that has been arranged... Our people will call out to you... Hey... God Bless U... AK...
GBU my friend... God Bless U blast... AK on fire... AK on fire...
